g.text: same retrieval.search path · never drifts from production
synthetic or gold cases · baseline compare · CI gate
pocket update --graph · POCKET_GRAPH=1 · same Δ lineage/memo sweep
extractor: deterministic (offline) | ollama | airllm · entities + relations tables
pocket graph "Pocket" --limit 20 · augments Hybrid RRF with graph neighbours
